text: This article features selected excerpts from Nikolai A. Voznesenskiy’s seminal work, *The Military Economy of the USSR during the Patriotic War*. As a pivotal figure in the Soviet war effort, Voznesenskiy spearheaded the development of critical military-economic strategies and oversaw the establishment of the massive industrial complex in the East. This base proved instrumental in maintaining a continuous supply of military hardware to the front lines. Beyond his strategic planning, Voznesenskiy held personal responsibility for the procurement of weaponry and ammunition for the Red Army and served as a key member of the committee tasked with reconstructing the national economy in territories liberated from Nazi occupation.
